codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the prior blocking defect: the deviation doc now references `/onboard-sponsor/handoff` (not `/onboard-sponsor/package`) and the companion stale component name was corrected to `OnboardSponsorHandoffScreen`. Reviewing both the original failing diff (612a12f) and fix diff (fdafb0b) confirms the route mismatch is resolved and sponsor live-route references align with `src/app/CoreRoutes.tsx`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned `ui-screen-worker` skill remains a poor fit for docs-only work, so procedure deviations recur even on straightforward documentation fixes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Fix handoff (`d3205af6-cee5-4ecb-a361-be71465953fb`) records `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: false` with explicit skips for RED-first tests and agent-browser manual verification because only `docs/runtime-deviations-from-paper.md` changed; `.factory/skills/ui-screen-worker/SKILL.md` still mandates UI-centric steps.

summary: PASS: commit fdafb0bd corrects the documented sponsor hand-off route to `/onboard-sponsor/handoff`, removes the stale `/onboard-sponsor/package` reference, and adequately resolves the prior scrutiny failure.
